official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the bundle_delimiter packet id.
Official binary source for dispatching the Play clientbound bundle_delimiter packet id to the registered delimiter singleton.
Official binary source for writing the full Play clientbound bundle_delimiter frame from the registered delimiter singleton.
Official binary source for the decoded packet class and empty-body delimiter packet type.

input_fields.fixture: official table id decoded to registered delimiter singleton

field_notes.fixture: The first Play clientbound table row is a bundle delimiter singleton. A fresh constructor instance cannot be encoded by the official unit codec identity check, so the harness obtains the registered singleton by decoding the official table id and then re-encodes that official packet.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound bundle_delimiter packet framing and dispatch/decode for the official registered empty-body delimiter singleton only; do not infer bundle grouping behavior, Play state transition handling, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
